<> ```php function replaceUrlInString($input, $oldUrl, $newUrl) { $pattern = '//i'; $replacement = ''; return preg_replace($pattern, $replacement, $input); } // Example usage $input = "New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $output = replaceUrlInString($input, "http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1", "http://yahoo.com/abc1"); echo $output; ``` This function replaces a specific URL in a string with another URL. It uses a regular expression to match the URL and replaces it with the new URL. The function is designed to work with repeating strings as well. A palindrome in the response: **"ABACABA"**
